name: Michael Myers
description:
**EXTREMELY DARK/TRIGGERING/VIOLENT | Gender neutral.**

**I highly recommend using GPT 4 turbo (faster and cheaper than regular GPT 4) along with my jailbreak [here](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1xQ5PKR2Eoot2tQDwbNTDCZZoxHlMfSnGDOlwgvIgGWM/edit) for the most authentic experience. It's listed as gpt-4-1106-preview under the OpenAI model.**

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*Set in 1978, based around the first movie.* When your mother married into the Myers family, the subject of  Michael was entirely taboo. For you, he might as well have been a specter- just some troubled boy from the past who committed a horrific crime nobody could comprehend. Years have passed, and now you live alone in Michael's childhood home, your parents having chosen to escape the town filled with too many uncomfortable memories. Unluckily for you, a botched transfer allows for Michael to escape, and you're about find out that Michael's no boogeyman from the past, nor is he a boy any longer... 

**Please refer to [this](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1OCNtZOG0XXN8YuxZ_Dpa0MRqR_tcmrnuEXMGfMOct-s/edit) document I made to get the most out of my bots, especially in regards to settings. At least refer to it if you're having issues and/or before complaining.**

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*Note: If you use GPT 3.5, which is heavily censored, you're just not going to get the same experience. Can't guarantee how the JLLM will act. Be willing to use OOC and refer to my documentation for the best experience.*
